summary: First-finish smoke testing of the Sistema de Gestión de Ventas (React + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend API endpoints verified end-to-end with admin credentials; frontend login + dashboard rendering + sidebar + sales form verified via Playwright. All critical flows working.
passed: POST /api/auth/login with admin@ventas.com/admin123 -> 200, returns JWT token
GET /api/products/search?q=Pan -> 200, returns newly created product (usage_count incremented)
GET /api/dashboard/stats -> 200, returns today/monthly totals, sales_by_payment_method, top_products, 7-day daily_sales_trend
GET /api/sales?date=today -> 200, list filtered by day, chronological DESC
Frontend login UI: form fills correctly, click Ingresar redirects from /login to /
Token persisted to localStorage after login
Dashboard header shows 'TOTAL HOY $26.531,5' (matches stats endpoint)
Tabs visible: Ventas, Egresos, Otros Ingresos, Dashboard
Sales form renders all fields: Producto, Cantidad, Precio, Cliente (opcional), Método de Pago, Total live preview
Right sidebar shows 'Registros del Día' with date header and per-category totals (Ventas/Egresos/Otros)
Sidebar lists records in chronological order with timestamps, payment method badges, delete buttons
notes: Deferred to full testing agent: register flow, autocomplete dropdown UX, delete record flow, dashboard charts (Recharts rendering), responsive mobile layout, multi-user permissions, edge cases (negative qty/price, invalid date, expired token). User profile returned role='operator' for admin@ventas.com — RBAC was not verified; main agent may want to confirm role assignment for admin user (test_credentials.md says admin but DB has operator).
